programs.title: CULTURAL INHERITORS Ancient Ru Kiln embraces its new era
programs.desc: The Vibe production team's meticulously crafted documentary series \"Cultural Inheritors\". The eight episodes span across various regions of China, focusing on the inheritors and artists of intangible cultural heritage. They explore and innovate with artisanal dedication, showcasing the extraordinary craftsmanship of fields such as the Ru Kiln porcelain, colored stone inlay, Pu'er tea, and Lingnan woodwork. Let’s embark on a cultural journey together, savoring the beauty of tradition and embracing the spirit of intangible cultural heritage.

programs.title: A Vibe of the Village: The Beat of Xiangxi Drums
programs.desc: Experience the vibrant power of Xiangxi Drum Dance. This program delves into the heart of Tujia and Miao cultures, showcasing the rhythmic beats and spirited performances that have echoed through West Hunan's mountains for centuries. Discover the stories, traditions, and raw energy of this captivating folk art.

programs.title: Kesi
programs.desc: Silk is a classic symbol of Chinese culture. It helped opened up economic and cultural exchanges between East and West and witnessed the spread of Eastern civilization to the world. As a representative of traditional Chinese silk art, kesi is renowned for its highly ornamental weaving techniques of highlighting warps and breaking wefts, and has been deeply loved by people for thousands of years. In folk culture, it enjoys the reputation of “an inch of kesi is worth an inch of gold.

programs.title: Nyingchi Ep.2
programs.desc: In this episode, Tianran He continues his journey through Nyingchi, Xizang Autonomous Region. He meets the Lhoba people, China’s smallest ethnic group, who show him their traditional hunting attire. At a sacred lake, Tianran visits an ancient monastery and witnesses the 3000-year-old dance of the Gongbo Tibetans, before venturing to a remote village to experience their their way of life.

programs.title: The Art of Harmony: Inseparability of Things
programs.desc: “The Art of Harmony” is a documentary about Confucianism, produced by CGTN and Discovery Channel. It highlights the timeless nature of the sage’s philosophy and its global relevance today. Join us in exploring how the world might benefit from the pursuit of “The Art of Harmony”.

programs.title: Nyingchi Ep.3
programs.desc: In this episode, Tianran He rounds off his travels through Nyingchi, Xizang Autonomous Region. He journeys into the Yarlung Zangbo Grand Canyon – one of the largest and deepest canyons on Earth, and along the way, tries to catch a glimpse of Mount Namcha Barwa, the easternmost peak of the Himalayas. Instead, he encounters a waterfall said to be a gateway to the afterlife, before finally arriving at the entrance to the canyon.
